_loomcycle.description: Generic per-user-authorized HTTP MCP server template (JobEmber-shaped). Demonstrates ${run.credentials.<name>} substitution for per-fork bearer auth.
_loomcycle.agent_prompt_hint: This is a template recipe — operator forks it to point at their actual jobs MCP server. The Authorization header uses ${run.credentials.jobs} so each scheduled-run fork or per-user spawn can carry its own bearer. Compose with RFC E schedules for per-user nightly ingestion + RFC F per-run credentials for on-demand requests.
